title: mutisia retrorsa
intro: Mutisia retrorsa, also known as the "Mountain Mutisia," is a species of flowering plant native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mutisia retrorsa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal uses, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
